printify.name: Printify
printify.commission_terms: Calculated on product cost; monthly PayPal payouts
printify.offer: No up-front costs; sign up and start referring 900+ products immediately.

kit.name: Kit
kit.commission_terms: 50% for the first 12 months; up to 20% recurring indefinitely for Bronze+ status
kit.offer: 50% payout for every new creator referral. Tiered recurring revenue for long-term growth.

manychat.name: Manychat
manychat.commission_terms: Up to 50% recurring commission on Pro plan subscriptions
manychat.offer: First Month Pro FREE; Automate Instagram, TikTok, and WhatsApp growth.

pandadoc.name: PandaDoc
pandadoc.commission_terms: Based on gross sales price; monthly automatic payments
pandadoc.offer: AI-powered document automation, digital signatures, and workflow management.

floristone.name: Floristone
floristone.commission_terms: 20% on Flowers and Memorial Trees; 10% for individual offerings
floristone.offer: Premium local flower delivery via FTD and Teleflora networks.
